hero.title: Resources
hero.subtitle: Empowering Justice Through Knowledge & Technology
hero.description: Access comprehensive information, official documents, and educational materials about PCR Act and PoA Act implementation

videos.title: Educational Videos
videos.description: Watch comprehensive tutorials and awareness videos about the platform, application process, and your rights under PCR & PoA Acts

platformOverview.title: Platform Overview
platformOverview.description: Get a complete walkthrough of the NyayaSetu platform. Learn about all features, navigation, and how our technology-driven approach ensures transparent, efficient, and timely delivery of justice and benefits.
platformOverview.aboutDescription: NyayaSetu is an integrated digital platform for transparent and efficient delivery of benefits under PCR and PoA Acts, ensuring timely justice for marginalized communities.
platformOverview.comingSoonText: Platform overview video will be available shortly

poaAct.title: Understanding PoA Act, 1989
poaAct.description: Learn about the Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes (Prevention of Atrocities) Act, 1989. Understand the protections it provides, types of offenses covered, relief and rehabilitation schemes, and how to access justice under this landmark legislation.
poaAct.aboutDescription: The Prevention of Atrocities Act protects Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes from discrimination and atrocities, providing stringent punishment for offenders and ensuring relief and rehabilitation for victims.

pcrAct.title: Understanding PCR Act, 1955
pcrAct.description: Learn about the Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955, a pivotal legislation that abolishes untouchability. Understand civil rights protections, legal provisions, inter-caste marriage schemes, and how this Act promotes social equality and dignity for all citizens.
pcrAct.aboutDescription: The Protection of Civil Rights Act abolishes untouchability and ensures equal civil rights for all citizens, promoting dignity and justice for marginalized communities while criminalizing discriminatory practices.

additionalResources.description: Quick access to forms, templates, and helpful information
